basic_details.job_title: CSIR IITR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Project Associate, Project Scientist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - Indian Institute of Toxicology Research

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Female: 5 years; OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in relevant scientific fields, Doctoral Degree in Science or Masters in Engineering/Technology, Minimum 2-5 years research experience as per level
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (PAT-I): Master's Degree in Pharma / Biotechnology / Nanotechnology / Nanoscience / Life Sciences / Biochemistry / Chemistry / Veterinary Science / Zoology / Toxicology / Pharmacology / Microbiology / Environmental Microbiology from a recognized university or equivalent. Project Associate-II (PAT-II): Master's Degree in Veterinary Science / Animal Science / Life Science / Toxicology / Biotechnology / Pharmacology / Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences / MVSC / Animal Sciences or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized university or equivalent and 2 years experience in Research and Development. Senior Project Associate (Senior-PAT): Masters / Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences / MVSc / Animal Sciences or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent and 3 years experience in Research and Development or Doctoral Degree in Science / Pharma / MD / MS from a recognized University or equivalent. Project Scientist-I (PS-I): Doctoral Degree in Science or Masters in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University or equivalent and 4 years experience in Research and Development. Project Scientist-II (PS-II): Doctoral Degree in Science or Master's / Integrated Master's in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university or equivalent and 5 years experience in Research and Development.

salary_details.project associate-i (pat-i): Rs.25,000/- + HRA (20% of fellowship) or Rs.31,000/- + HRA (20% of fellowship)
salary_details.project associate-ii (pat-ii): Rs.28,000/- + HRA (20% of fellowship) or Rs.35,000/- + HRA (20% of fellowship)

selection_process: Written Examination (for PAT-I only) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR IITR Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR IITR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR IITR Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR IITR Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CSIR IITR Project Staff recruitment is 21-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at CSIR IITR?
faq.answer: There are a total of 34 vacancies for Project Staff posts announced by CSIR IITR in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all Project Staff posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years, with applicable age relaxations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CSIR IITR Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CSIR IITR Project Staff recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Project Scientist-I (PS-I) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Project Scientist-I (PS-I) posts includes a Written Examination, followed by an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the starting salary for Project Associate-I (PAT-I) posts?
faq.answer: The starting salary for Project Associate-I (PAT-I) posts is Rs. 25,000/- + HRA (20% of fellowship) per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the highest salary offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The highest salary offered is Rs. 67,000/- + HRA (20% of fellowship) per month for the Project Scientist-II (PS-II) post.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations available for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are available for SC/ST/PwBD/Female candidates (5 years) and OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates (3 years).

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for CSIR IITR Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for CSIR IITR Project Staff recruitment is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CSIR IITR Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
